warnings: List has 68 cards after validation; trimmed to 60 for Modern.
results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.8.
results.why: This pass trims excess lands and a slower flex slot to fit Modern’s 60-card minimum while tightening the deck’s low-curve aggro plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds more early pressure, and [[Searing Blaze]] plus [[Skullcrack]] improve reach and interaction without raising the curve much. The result is a leaner, more focused burn shell.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.8.
raw.plan: This pass trims excess lands and a slower flex slot to fit Modern’s 60-card minimum while tightening the deck’s low-curve aggro plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds more early pressure, and [[Searing Blaze]] plus [[Skullcrack]] improve reach and interaction without raising the curve much. The result is a leaner, more focused burn shell.
raw.why: This pass trims excess lands and a slower flex slot to fit Modern’s 60-card minimum while tightening the deck’s low-curve aggro plan. [[Goblin Guide]] adds more early pressure, and [[Searing Blaze]] plus [[Skullcrack]] improve reach and interaction without raising the curve much. The result is a leaner, more focused burn shell.

added.goblin guide: [[Goblin Guide]] gives the deck a premium one-drop that maximizes early damage output.
added.searing blaze: [[Searing Blaze]] adds efficient removal that also pushes damage to the opponent.
added.skullcrack: [[Skullcrack]] improves reach while stopping life gain from blunting burn math.

removed.mountain: [[Mountain]] was cut because the list had excess lands for its very low average mana value.
removed.inspiring vantage: [[Inspiring Vantage]] was trimmed as part of reducing land count while keeping the mana base functional.
removed.sacred foundry: [[Sacred Foundry]] was trimmed to lower total lands after validation left the deck oversized.
removed.roiling vortex: [[Roiling Vortex]] was removed as a slower nonessential slot to make room for more direct pressure and interaction.

warnings: List has 68 cards after validation; trimmed to 60 for Modern.
